gigapan.name: Castle Crags State Park and Ammiratis Market, California (l9)
gigapan.description:
I blasted down I5, glanced over and saw these awesome rocks...big rocks, Crags in fact.  I decided, too late, that I should photograph them.  I went to the next exit, a ways down the mountain, turned around, came back.

I didn't even know there was a 'Castle Crags State Park.'  It is gorgeous.  I have other gigapans from up closer, from the 'vista point' but then I came down and stopped at Ammirati's market.  And looking around, and into the beer cooler, I found satisfaction.

It wasn't that I wanted Beer, but I did buy a bottle of 'Ammirati's Castle Crags Ale,' but rather, the whole experience.  At the end of my 11 day trip, while heading home, I finally had that feeling I was looking for.  That feeling of just bopping around, taking pictures, experiencing life.
